warnings: Invalid expression “kw:unblockable” was ignored. Unknown keyword “unblockable”

data.name: Azure Beastbinder
data.oracle_text:
Vigilance
This creature can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or greater.
Whenever this creature attacks, up to one target artifact, creature, or planeswalker an opponent controls loses all abilities until your next turn. If it's a creature, it also has base power and toughness 2/2 until your next turn.

data.name: Burrowguard Mentor
data.oracle_text:
Trample
Burrowguard Mentor's power and toughness are each equal to the number of creatures you control.
data.flavor_text: "On your paws! I've been fighting in these fields for more seasons than you've had hot dinners!"

data.name: Byway Barterer
data.oracle_text:
Menace
Whenever you expend 4, you may discard your hand. If you do, draw two cards. (You expend 4 as you spend your fourth total mana to cast spells during a turn.)
data.flavor_text: "This trinket has saved my hide more times than I can count. I couldn't possibly let it go for less than say . . . four acorns."

data.name: Camellia, the Seedmiser
data.oracle_text:
Menace
Other Squirrels you control have menace.
Whenever you sacrifice one or more Foods, create a 1/1 green Squirrel creature token.
{2}, Forage: Put a +1/+1 counter on each other Squirrel you control. (To forage, exile three cards from your graveyard or sacrifice a Food.)

data.name: Cindering Cutthroat
data.oracle_text:
This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it if an opponent lost life this turn.
{1}{B/R}: This creature gains menace until end of turn. (It can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.)
data.flavor_text: "We don't 'play' with fire. It is strictly business."

data.name: Darkstar Augur
data.oracle_text:
Offspring {B} (You may pay an additional {B} as you cast this spell. If you do, when this creature enters, create a 1/1 token copy of it.)
Flying
At the beginning of your upkeep, reveal the top card of your library and put that card into your hand. You lose life equal to its mana value.

data.name: Dragonhawk, Fate's Tempest
data.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever Dragonhawk enters or attacks, exile the top X cards of your library, where X is the number of creatures you control with power 4 or greater. You may play those cards until your next end step. At the beginning of your next end step, Dragonhawk deals 2 damage to each opponent for each of those cards that are still exiled.

data.name: Essence Channeler
data.oracle_text:
As long as you've lost life this turn, this creature has flying and vigilance.
Whenever you gain life, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.
When this creature dies, put its counters on target creature you control.

data.name: Finch Formation
data.oracle_text:
Offspring {3} (You may pay an additional {3} as you cast this spell. If you do, when this creature enters, create a 1/1 token copy of it.)
Flying
When this creature enters, target creature you control gains flying until end of turn.

data.name: Frilled Sparkshooter
data.oracle_text:
Menace, reach
This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it if an opponent lost life this turn.
data.flavor_text: Its frills keep it steady, making its aim impeccable.

data.name: Galewind Moose
data.oracle_text:
Flash
Vigilance, reach, trample
data.flavor_text:
"Something has stirred the Calamity Beasts, and they are wreaking havoc. Anyone who wishes to help, come forth! Whether it's with your swords in the fight or your shovels in the field, join me!"
—Mabel, heir to Cragflame

data.name: Glidedive Duo
data.oracle_text:
Flying
When this creature enters, each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.
data.flavor_text:
"Catch the thermal!" called the bat.
"What's a thermal?!" cried the lizard.

data.name: Honored Dreyleader
data.oracle_text:
Trample
When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on it for each other Squirrel and/or Food you control.
Whenever another Squirrel or Food you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

data.name: Hugs, Grisly Guardian
data.oracle_text:
Trample
When Hugs enters, exile the top X cards of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play those cards.
You may play an additional land on each of your turns.
data.flavor_text: Most of his scars tell tales. A few tell jokes.

data.name: Huskburster Swarm
data.oracle_text:
This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature card you own in exile and in your graveyard.
Menace, deathtouch

data.name: Jackdaw Savior
data.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever this creature or another creature you control with flying dies, return another target creature card with lesser mana value from your graveyard to the battlefield.

data.name: Junkblade Bruiser
data.oracle_text:
Trample
Whenever you expend 4, this creature gets +2/+1 until end of turn. (You expend 4 as you spend your fourth total mana to cast spells during a turn.)
data.flavor_text: Each scrap shed from her battle-axe is more likely to end up stored permanently in an enemy's skull.

data.name: Kastral, the Windcrested
data.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever one or more Birds you control deal combat damage to a player, choose one —
• You may put a Bird creature card from your hand or graveyard onto the battlefield with a finality counter on it.
• Put a +1/+1 counter on each Bird you control.
• Draw a card.

data.name: Knightfisher
data.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever another nontoken Bird you control enters, create a 1/1 blue Fish creature token.
data.flavor_text: His keen eyes can see the glint of scales far below the river's surface.

data.name: Lifecreed Duo
data.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever another creature you control enters, you gain 1 life.
data.flavor_text: "Why are you eating upside down?" asked the bird. "Why are you eating upside up?" replied the bat.

data.name: Maha, Its Feathers Night
data.oracle_text:
Flying, trample
Ward—Discard a card.
Creatures your opponents control have base toughness 1.
data.flavor_text: Its wingspan reaches from dusk to dawn.

data.name: Mockingbird
data.oracle_text:
Flying
You may have this creature enter as a copy of any creature on the battlefield with mana value less than or equal to the amount of mana spent to cast this creature, except it's a Bird in addition to its other types and it has flying.
data.flavor_text: "Laughing at you? No, no, I'm laughing *as* you!"

data.name: Moonrise Cleric
data.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever this creature attacks, you gain 1 life.
data.flavor_text: "The sunrisers have entrusted me with their life force. I intend to repay them bountifully."

data.name: Moonstone Harbinger
data.oracle_text:
Flying, deathtouch
Whenever you gain or lose life during your turn, Bats you control get +1/+0 and gain deathtouch until end of turn. This ability triggers only once each turn.
data.flavor_text: Moonstone weapons drink in the last light of dusk to give their wielders an edge in combat.

data.name: Nightwhorl Hermit
data.oracle_text:
Vigilance
Threshold — As long as there are seven or more cards in your graveyard, this creature gets +1/+0 and can't be blocked.
data.flavor_text: He etches his secrets onto the shimmering shells of mussels, saving them to share with the Great Snail.

data.name: Pawpatch Recruit
data.oracle_text:
Offspring {2} (You may pay an additional {2} as you cast this spell. If you do, when this creature enters, create a 1/1 token copy of it.)
Trample
Whenever a creature you control becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control other than that creature.

data.name: Pileated Provisioner
data.oracle_text:
Flying
When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control without flying.
data.flavor_text: Aerial supporters train for years to make sure the weapons they drop land in the hands of mice and not on their heads.

data.name: Plumecreed Escort
data.oracle_text:
Flash
Flying
When this creature enters, target creature you control gains hexproof until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: "I defend Valley and its beauty. What better weapon to wield than beauty itself?"

data.name: Plumecreed Mentor
data.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever this creature or another creature you control with flying enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control without flying.
data.flavor_text: "Any fledgling can flap their wings. But a true windscout must soar!"

data.name: Quaketusk Boar
data.oracle_text: Reach, trample, haste
data.flavor_text:
"Calamity Beasts are running through Valley, leaving death and destruction in their wake. I have a plan to stop them."
—Glarb, ruler of Fountainport

data.name: Ravine Raider
data.oracle_text:
Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.)
{1}{B}: This creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: The path to the Cliff of Heroes is rife with bandits, expertly camouflaged in the dense flora of Valley.

data.name: Reptilian Recruiter
data.oracle_text:
Trample
When this creature enters, choose target creature. If that creature's power is 2 or less or if you control another Lizard, gain control of that creature until end of turn, untap it, and it gains haste until end of turn.

data.name: Roughshod Duo
data.oracle_text:
Trample
Whenever you expend 4, target creature you control gets +1/+1 and gains trample until end of turn. (You expend 4 as you spend your fourth total mana to cast spells during a turn.)
data.flavor_text: "En garde, you inadequate excuse for a foe!" challenged the mouse. "Raaahrgh grrrr raaaargh!" agreed the raccoon.

data.name: Rust-Shield Rampager
data.oracle_text:
Offspring {2} (You may pay an additional {2} as you cast this spell. If you do, when this creature enters, create a 1/1 token copy of it.)
This creature can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.

data.name: Salvation Swan
data.oracle_text:
Flash
Flying
Whenever this creature or another Bird you control enters, exile up to one target creature you control without flying. Return it to the battlefield under its owner's control with a flying counter on it at the beginning of the next end step.

data.name: Seedpod Squire
data.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever this creature attacks, target creature you control without flying gets +1/+1 until end of turn.
data.flavor_text:
"If you think he's loud now, wait until he starts the battle song."
—Clement, pessimistic adventurer

data.name: Serra Redeemer
data.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever another creature you control with power 2 or less enters, put two +1/+1 counters on that creature.
data.flavor_text: "Heroism is neither a strong arm nor a divine destiny. It is the choice to stand unbowed against impossible odds."

data.name: Shoreline Looter
data.oracle_text:
This creature can't be blocked.
Threshold — Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw a card. Then discard a card unless there are seven or more cards in your graveyard.
data.flavor_text: A water skimmer's ability to sense danger in the slightest ripple makes them a prized companion for Long River trawlers.

data.name: Shrike Force
data.oracle_text: Flying, double strike, vigilance
data.flavor_text:
"I've trained every one of them in aerial maneuvers, talon strikes, and dive precision. They are the top of my class, and they may surpass me one day."
—Quickwing, master flyer

data.name: Skyskipper Duo
data.oracle_text:
Flying
When this creature enters, exile up to one other target creature you control. Return it to the battlefield under its owner's control at the beginning of the next end step.
data.flavor_text: "I don't know how to swim!" said the bird. "That's okay! I don't know how to fly!" laughed the frog.

data.name: Star Charter
data.oracle_text:
Flying
At the beginning of your end step, if you gained or lost life this turn, look at the top four cards of your library. You may reveal a creature card with power 3 or less from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

data.name: Starlit Soothsayer
data.oracle_text:
Flying
At the beginning of your end step, if you gained or lost life this turn, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)
data.flavor_text: "The Lunar Paean is upon us. Let us turn to our ancestors for guidance, and look to our children for hope."

data.name: Starscape Cleric
data.oracle_text:
Offspring {2}{B} (You may pay an additional {2}{B} as you cast this spell. If you do, when this creature enters, create a 1/1 token copy of it.)
Flying
This creature can't block.
Whenever you gain life, each opponent loses 1 life.

data.name: Starseer Mentor
data.oracle_text:
Flying, vigilance
At the beginning of your end step, if you gained or lost life this turn, target opponent loses 3 life unless they sacrifice a nonland permanent of their choice or discard a card.
data.flavor_text: "Each star is given a name befitting its grandeur. This one is called Aurax, the Night-Eater. That one is called Blinky."

data.name: Teapot Slinger
data.oracle_text:
Menace
Whenever you expend 4, this creature deals 2 damage to each opponent. (You expend 4 as you spend your fourth total mana to cast spells during a turn.)
data.flavor_text: "For the last time it's *porcelain*, not stoneware, you ignorant fool!"

data.name: The Infamous Cruelclaw
data.oracle_text:
Menace
Whenever The Infamous Cruelclaw deals combat damage to a player, exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland card. You may cast that card by discarding a card rather than paying its mana cost.

data.name: Thought-Stalker Warlock
data.oracle_text:
Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.)
When this creature enters, choose target opponent. If they lost life this turn, they reveal their hand, you choose a nonland card from it, and they discard that card. Otherwise, they discard a card.

data.name: Tidecaller Mentor
data.oracle_text:
Menace
Threshold — When this creature enters, if there are seven or more cards in your graveyard, return up to one target nonland permanent to its owner's hand.
data.flavor_text: "The same tides that bring us knowledge can sweep us away."

data.name: Valley Mightcaller
data.oracle_text:
Trample
Whenever another Frog, Rabbit, Raccoon, or Squirrel you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.
data.flavor_text: "There is no path to the Root Maze's center. Bard, sing a song while I create one."

data.name: Valley Rotcaller
data.oracle_text:
Menace
Whenever this creature attacks, each opponent loses X life and you gain X life, where X is the number of other Squirrels, Bats, Lizards, and Rats you control.
data.flavor_text:
We all share one life and one death.
—Rotcaller saying

data.name: Waterspout Warden
data.oracle_text: Whenever this creature attacks, if another creature entered the battlefield under your control this turn, this creature gains flying until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: The escape route of many a birdfolk thief has been less surefire than they'd thought.

data.name: Wax-Wane Witness
data.oracle_text:
Flying, vigilance
Whenever you gain or lose life during your turn, this creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: Batfolk clerics consider the cycle of light and darkness as a sacred allegory of life and death.

data.name: Zoraline, Cosmos Caller
data.oracle_text:
Flying, vigilance
Whenever a Bat you control attacks, you gain 1 life.
Whenever Zoraline enters or attacks, you may pay {W}{B} and 2 life. When you do, return target nonland permanent card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield with a finality counter on it.
